ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Response is contextually relevant and consistent with the persona but could be more natural in tone to convey urgency effectively without sounding too formal.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>The response is contextually relevant and maintains persona consistency, but lacks naturalness in tone to improve overall quality.<TAB>Short note: A more personalized approach could enhance the interaction.
The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency as a calm and caring healer, sounds natural in conversation but could be more specific about the immediate actions to take.
